name: hcf-secret-scan
description: HCF — Secret & Key Exposure Scan. OFFLINE heuristic scan of pasted config/env/log/code text for exposed credential patterns (vendor key formats, JWTs with real header decoding, private-key blocks, connection-string passwords, high-entropy named assignments). Every match is MASKED. Heuristic only — never a guarantee. Deterministic engine + landing page + Stripe checkout scaffold.
